mapper.sql: a.id AS "id", a.name AS "name", a.category_id AS "category.id", a.price AS "price", a.create_by_id AS "createBy.id", a.create_time AS "createDate", a.update_by_id AS "updateBy.id", a.update_time AS "updateDate", a.remarks AS "remarks", a.del_flag AS "delFlag", category.name AS "category.name"
LEFT JOIN test_category category ON category.id = a.category_id
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM test_goods a
WHERE a.id = #{id} and a.del_flag = 0
